title: taraxacum lidianum
intro: Taraxacum lidianum, also known as the Liddesdale dandelion, is a species of flowering plant within the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly used to stimulate digestion and relieve liver and gallbladder issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum lidianum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized in various ways.
